ns0:entry.ns0:title: AFLplusplus/AFLplusplus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AFLplusplus/AFLplusplus
Language: c
The fuzzer afl++ is afl with community patches, qemu 5.1 upgrade, collision-free coverage, enhanced laf-intel & redqueen, AFLfast++ power schedules, MOpt mutators, unicorn_mode, and a lot more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DarkFlippers/unleashed-firmware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DarkFlippers/unleashed-firmware
Language: c
Flipper Zero Unleashed Firmware

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ImageMagick/ImageMagick
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick
Language: c
ImageMagick is a free, open-source software suite for creating, editing, converting, and displaying images. It supports 200+ formats and offers powerful command-line tools and APIs for automation, scripting, and integration across platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LumaTeam/Luma3DS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LumaTeam/Luma3DS
Language: c
Nintendo 3DS "Custom Firmware"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RfidResearchGroup/proxmark3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RfidResearchGroup/proxmark3
Language: c
Iceman Fork - Proxmark3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TsudaKageyu/minhook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TsudaKageyu/minhook
Language: c
The Minimalistic x86/x64 API Hooking Library for Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: arendst/Tasmota
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/arendst/Tasmota
Language: c
Alternative firmware for ESP8266 and ESP32 based devices with easy configuration using webUI, OTA updates, automation using timers or rules, expandability and entirely local control over MQTT, HTTP, Serial or KNX. Full documentation at

ns0:entry.ns0:title: brunodev85/winlator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator
Language: c
Android application for running Windows applications with Wine and Box86/Box64

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
Language: c
A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glfw/glfw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glfw/glfw
Language: c
A multi-platform library for OpenGL, OpenGL ES, Vulkan, window and input

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lambertjamesd/n64brew2025
Language: c
Our team entry for the 2025 brew game jam

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL
Language: c
Simple DirectMedia Layer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lvgl/lvgl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lvgl/lvgl
Language: c
Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mpv-player/mpv
Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opa334/Dopamine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opa334/Dopamine
Language: c
Dopamine is a semi-untethered jailbreak for iOS 15 and 16

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openwrt/openwrt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt
Language: c
This repository is a mirror of https://git.openwrt.org/openwrt/openwrt.git It is for reference only and is not active for check-ins. We will continue to accept Pull Requests here. They will be merged via staging trees then into openwrt.git.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qmk/qmk_firmware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qmk/qmk_firmware
Language: c
Open-source keyboard firmware for Atmel AVR and Arm USB families

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xiph/opus
Language: c
Modern audio compression for the internet.
